desc: 2 bedrooms plus den. Spacious LR/DR combination. Washer/dryer included. Newer windows and carpet. Near park-and-ride, shopping, highway, and mall. No pets. Minimum 1-year lease. Credit check required.
description:
2-bedroom plus den condo with a spacious living room / dining room combination — an ideal layout for comfortable everyday living. Washer/dryer is included. Newer windows and carpet throughout.

Located close to a park-and-ride, shopping centers, the Garden State Parkway, and Freehold Raceway Mall. No pets. Minimum 1-year lease required. Credit check required.
